arts.ttl: I am a Liverpool record breaker - now I am plotting Man City and Pep Guardiola's downfall
arts.sum: Ben Woodburn broke records at Liverpool but his career has taken him to Salford City - Man City's FA Cup third round opponents

arts.ttl: Why Man City are spending £50m on Omar Marmoush: The Mo Salah similarities, his free-kick party trick... and the reason Nottingham Forest rejected him
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Marinakis should feel very happy with his recent transfer business but the Nottingham Forest owner must wince every time he hears the name of City's next £50million striker.

arts.ttl: Man City hold further talks over £25m teenage Brazilian star - as they close in on £85m double-swoop for forward and defender
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The centre-back is also wanted by Brighton but Palmeiras want £35million, with the south coast club having previously made an offer of only £23m.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Citizens 'on verge of signing' Ligue 1 centre-back to bolster Pep Guardiola's defensive options
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly on the brink of bolstering their defensive options with the addition of Lens centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov.

arts.ttl: Sources: Manchester City have lodged bid for 'fast' and 'powerful' centre-back wanted by Tottenham
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Manchester City have lodged a bid for Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov, who in turn wants to move to the...

arts.ttl: Florian Plettenberg: Marmoush and Man City agree to terms, Füllkrug joins list of potential replacements
arts.sum: German transfer guru Florian Plettenberg is now reporting that Omar Marmoush and Man City have agreed to terms and that a transfer is imminent. Plettenberg further notes that Eintracht are considering German national team striker Niclas Füllkrug as a potential replacement.

arts.ttl: Lens seek club-record transfer fee for Manchester City target Abdukodir Khusanov
arts.sum: Lens will look to garner a club-record transfer fee for the transfer of Manchester City target Abdukodir Khusanov (20), according to a report from L’Equipe. The Premier League champions are…

arts.ttl: Sources: Man City are progressing in deal to sign £50m forward Mohamed Salah said is 'incredibly talented'
arts.sum: Imagine the £50 million man under Pep Guardiola 💣

arts.ttl: Manchester City closing in on €80m agreement for Omar Marmoush
arts.sum: Manchester City are close to reaching a total agreement worth €80m with Eintracht Frankfurt for the signing of Omar Marmoush (25), Foot Mercato can reveal. The 25-year-old reportedly intends to…

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Citizens 'agree personal terms' with Omar Marmoush: When will they make first bid?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly closing in on the signing of Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush after agreeing personal terms with the 25-year-old.
